sections.heading: (1 )There shall be paid to the holder of an office specified Salary and
sections.text:
allowances
in the Schedule, a salary and allowances at such rate as the
Minister responsible for finance may prescribe, by statutory
instrument, in consultation with the Standing Orders
Committee of the National Assembly.
(2) Notwithstanding the repeal of the Schedule to this Act,
a holder of an office to whom subsection (1) applies, shall
continue to receive the salaries and allowances applicable
until the coming into operation of such statutory instrument
as the Minister responsible for finance may prescribe under
subsection (1).

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of the Schedule Repeal and
sections.text:
thereto and the substitution therefor of the Schedule set out in the replacement
of schedule
Appendix to this Act.
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000 each.
Constitutional Offices
